name: Vietnamese Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Shave the carrot into thin strips using a vegetable peeler.
2. Stack the strips 3-4 high and cut lengthwise into hair-thin slivers.
3. Combine garlic, shallot, chili, and sugar in a mortar and pestle, pounding until smooth.
4. Mix in fish sauce, lime juice, water, and rice wine vinegar.
5. Transfer the sauce to a bowl and stir in the carrot strips.
